title: Service Discovery & Load Balancing
description: Architect service discovery and load balancing using ClusterIP, NodePort, and LoadBalancer service types. Deconstruct the evolution of load balancing from kube-proxy (IPtables) to IPVS or eBPF.
objectives: Architect service discovery and load balancing using ClusterIP, NodePort, and LoadBalancer service types.
Deconstruct the evolution of load balancing from kube-proxy (IPtables) to IPVS or eBPF.
